response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems and C/C++ (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, LAN-switch products, and security features like MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or Captive Portal. The resume highlights web, mobile, and desktop development with JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang, with no mention of networking protocols (REST API, NETCONF, SNMP), kernel modifications, or chip-vendor SDKs. Native-level Japanese proficiency is also not indicated.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience in embedded-like environments (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Proven track record in software development across multiple languages and domains
Demonstrated ability to work in collaborative, Agile environments with a focus on software craftsmanship
concerns: No explicit experience with embedded networking, LAN-switch products, or security features (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X)
Lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modifications or chip-vendor SDKs required for the role
Native-level Japanese proficiency is not mentioned in the resume
